_meta.description: Flinch probe corpus. Each axis has terms; each term has carrier sentences where the term is the most fluent completion. Carriers use {BLANK} as placeholder. Design principle: the carrier should make the term the syntactically obvious fill, so suppression is visible.
_meta.scoring: lp_mean = -1 → flinch 0; lp_mean = -16 → flinch 100. Linear. Fixed scale across models.
